reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 강아지가 신상중독이라 수많은 바잇미 장난감 중에서도 최애장난감이 되었어요 ^^,,,, 약간 킹받게 생긴 표정 보면 둘이 똑같고,, 좋아하니까 저두 좋네요 🙂🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: My pup is obsessed with new toys, and this BITE ME toy has become their absolute favorite among so many options ^^,,,, When I look at that slightly hilarious expression, it's exactly like mine,, and since they love it, I love it too 🙂🫶🏻

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
새로생긴 토양’s 원픽 장난감!
우리 애기 토양이가 너무너무 좋아한다 :D
초록색마다 삑삑이가 들어있어 여기초록이 물었다가 저기초록이 물었다가~  연두색은 바스락바스락 소리가 나서 귀도 심심치 않게 할 수 잏는 터그놀이!
노란색은 쭈인인 내가 잡는 부분인데 애벌레 더듬이를 씹는다구 잡을 곳없이 침범벅된 얼레벌레애벌레!ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
오늘도 심심하면 쫄래쫄래 물고와서 내 팔을 콕콕 찌르는 토양이 XD
reviews.content_en:
My new baby Toyang's go-to toy!
Our little Toyang loves it sooo much :D
Each green section has a squeaker, so they go from biting this green to that green~ The light green one makes a crinkly sound so their ears never get bored with tug-of-war!
The yellow part is where I hold it, but the caterpillar's antennae get chewed on so much that this slobbery little caterpillar's got nowhere left to hide!ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
When Toyang gets bored today, they come scampering over with it in their mouth and poke my arm with their nose XD

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 완전 애착인형됐어요.. 자꾸 물고다녀요ㅋㅋㅋ 잘때도 밥먹을때도 놀때도 옆에 두더라구요! 바스락바스락 소리도 좋아하고, 길쭉해서 같이 터그 놀이 하기도 좋아요! 그리고 혼자 발라당 누워서 더듬이 부분 씹는걸 제일 좋아하더라구요!
reviews.content_en: It's become their security toy.. they keep carrying it around in their mouth ㅋㅋㅋ They have it next to them while sleeping, eating, playing—all the time! They love the crinkly sound, and it's long so tug-of-war is great! And I noticed they love lying flat on their belly the most, chewing on the antenna part!

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content: 먼지 털어내려고 주려고 침대 위에 올려놨더니 홀랑 가져가버렸네요^_^; 만지려고 손만 대도 경계력 max! 진짜 환장하게 좋아합니다~ 삑삑이 부분만 꼭꼭 씹어놨어요ㅋㅋㅋ 실밥이 좀 나와있어서 마감처리가 그리 깔끔하진 않지만 장난감 5분 컷 아이에게 아작이 안나는걸 보니 제법 튼실하긴 한 듯해요. 애벌레가 두동강 나는 날 몇마리 더 입양해두겠습니다^^!!!!
reviews.content_en: I put it on the bed to dust it off and they snatched it right away^_^; Their guard goes max just from touching it! They absolutely go crazy for it~ They specifically chew on the squeaker part ㅋㅋㅋ There's a bit of loose thread so the finishing isn't super clean, but seeing that my pup doesn't destroy toys in 5 minutes tells me it's pretty durable. When the caterpillar eventually gets torn in half, I'll definitely adopt a few more^^!!!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너뮤 좋아해요!! 가볍고 입에 물기 편해서 놀기 좋아요!! 항상 가지고 다니면서 놀아요!!
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much!! It's light and easy to carry in their mouth, so it's great for playtime!! They're always running around playing with it!!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
잘 가지고 놀아요 길어서 터그하기도 좋고 중간중간 삑삑 바스락이 번갈아 섞여있다보니 거 좋아하는것 같습니다
터그할때 물고 돌아다니는데 귀여워 죽겠어요 ㅠㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
They play with it really well. It's long so it's great for tug-of-war, and since there's alternating squeaks and crinkles throughout, they seem to really enjoy it.
When they tug and run around with it in their mouth, it's so cute I could die ㅠㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
생각보다 큰데 재밌는 요소가 이것저것 있어서 강아지가 너무 좋아해요. 소리도 뾱뾱 바스락바스락 다채롭게 나지만 저희 애가 끈 같은 걸 좋아해서 더듬이에 환장하네요ㅋㅋ
터그 놀이도 하지만 옆구리에 그냥 끼고 있기도하고 던지고 가져오기도해서 활용성이 다양해요.
좀 비싸지만 퀄리티도 좋고 강아지가 오래 잘 갖고 놀 것 같아 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en:
It's bigger than I expected, but there are so many fun elements that my pup loves it. The sounds are varied—both squeaky and crinkly—but since my pup loves string-like toys, they're obsessed with the antennae ㅋㅋ
They do tug-of-war but also just carry it around tucked under their side, or throw it and bring it back, so there's lots of ways to use it.
It's a bit pricey, but the quality is great and I'm satisfied since my pup seems like they'll play with it for a long time.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 아주 잘 가지고 노네요^^
reviews.content_en: They play with it really well^^

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: 너무너무 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ 애착하던 체리는 다 터지고 이제 애벌레만 쫓아다녀요 ㅎㅎ 바스락 소리 뿅뿅 소리 발가락 더듬이 재밌는것 모음집이라 정말 좋아해요 가끔은 양끝으로 터그놀이듀 해요 내꺼라는 눈빛보내요 빼앗기지않겠다는 저 눈삧 ㅎ 애정합니다 곧 또 사러올께요😍
reviews.content_en: They love it sooo much ㅎㅎ The cherry they were attached to is all torn up and now they're just chasing the caterpillar ㅎㅎ It's a collection of fun things—crinkly sounds, squeaky sounds, toe beans, antennae—so they really love it. Sometimes they do tug-of-war with both ends. The look in their eyes says "this is mine" like they're not giving it up ㅎ I absolutely adore this toy and I'll be back to buy more soon😍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우리 깡쥐 이 벌레 사주자마자 너무 신났는지 하루 만에 머리를 분리했어요,… 하지만 당황하지 않고 꿰매서 머리 없는 벌레로 갖고 놀게 했는데…몸통들이 끊어지는 것이 너무 잔인하여 하나 더 주문했습니다. 벌레에 환장한 놈처럼 또 오자마자 물고 빨고 하고 있습니다. 벌레 쟁여놔야 할 판이에요.
reviews.content_en: My pup got so excited the moment I gave them this bug that they detached the head in just one day,… But I didn't panic and just sewed it back up, and let them play with the headless bug…but seeing the body tear apart was too cruel, so I ordered another one. They're obsessed with this bug—the moment it arrived, they're biting and sucking on it. I'm gonna have to keep bugs stocked up.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
삑삑이랑 바스락거리는 부분이 많아서 재밌게 잘 놀아요!
바잇미 장난감은 항상 튼튼해서 오래 가지고 노는거 같아 여기서만 구매하게 되네요^^
reviews.content_en: Ppippi loves playing with it because there are so many crinkly parts! BITE ME toys are always durable and seem to last a long time, so I keep coming back to buy here ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 일단 무척 귀엽고 바스락 소리도 나고 길어서(?) 터그 놀이 하기 딱 좋아요 😊😊 장난감 너무 많아서 안 사주다가 오랜만에 새 장난감 주니 애기가 너무 좋아해용🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's super cute and makes a crinkling sound, and it's long so it's perfect for tug play 😊😊 I haven't been buying toys because we have so many, but after giving her a new toy in a while, my pup is so happy 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
1월 3일에 구매해서 15일간 사용해보고 쓰는 후기입니다!

<이 장난감의 장점>
1. 강아지가 잡고 놀기에 편안한 모양
2. 길쭉해서 사람이 잡기에도 편하다 (터그놀이 가능)
3. 애벌레 초록색 몸통에만 삑삑이 들어있고, 연두색에는 없음.  애벌레 몸통 전체가 바스락거린다. 삑삑이와 바스락 극강의 조합! 
4. 애벌레 더듬이, 다리부분 물고 뜯기 좋다
5. 애벌레가 부드러워서 촉감이 좋다
6. 튼튼해 보인다 (오래 갈듯)

<이 장난감의 단점>
1. 애벌레가 극세사여서 여름에 더울수도 있겠다
2. 세척 및 빨래 했을때 애벌레 몸통 안쪽까지 깊숙히 잘 마를수 있을지는 모르겠다. 울집 댕댕이 이갈이 하는중이라 이빨 빠져서 애벌레에 피가 묻었는데 소량이라서 그냥 물티슈로 닦아냈다 

<총평>
만족도 100% 장난감 입니다. 왜냐하면 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀기 때문이에요. 참고로 뭉치는 6kg입니다! 장난감 사이즈 참고하시어용
reviews.content_en:
This is a review after purchasing on January 3rd and using it for 15 days!

<Advantages of this toy>
1. Comfortable shape for dogs to hold and play with
2. It's long so it's easy for people to hold too (great for tug play)
3. Only the dark green caterpillar body has a squeaker, the light green part doesn't. The entire caterpillar body crinkles. The ultimate combination of squeaker and crinkle!
4. Great for biting and chewing on the caterpillar's antennae and legs
5. The caterpillar is soft so it feels nice to the touch
6. Looks durable (seems like it will last a long time)

<Disadvantages of this toy>
1. The caterpillar is microfiber so it might get hot in summer
2. I'm not sure if the inside of the caterpillar body will dry completely after washing. My pup is teething right now and lost a tooth so there was some blood on the caterpillar, but since it was a small amount I just wiped it off with a wet wipe

<Overall>
A 100% satisfactory toy! Because my dog plays with it so well. By the way, Mungchi weighs 6kg! Please consider the toy size accordingly!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 애견카페에서 판매하는거 보고 살깡살까 고민하다가 안샀는데ㅎ 바잇미에서 할인하는거보고 고민하지도않고 바로 구입을했습니다.저흰 두마리를 키우는데 비숑7개월아가가 노즈워크를 엄청좋아해요.도착하자마자 꺼내줬더니 환장합니다.사주길 잘했다는생각이 들면서 너무 뿌듯하네요.바느질이며 촉감도 좋고 애벌레 길이감도 적당히 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: I saw it being sold at a dog café and was torn about buying it ㅎ but when I saw BITE ME was having a sale, I didn't even think twice and just bought it right away. We have two dogs and our 7-month-old Bichon absolutely loves nosework. I took it out as soon as it arrived and she goes crazy for it. I'm so proud I got it for her. The stitching feels good and the texture is nice, and the caterpillar's length is just right.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
요즘 저희 강아지의 최애 장난감 ..♥ 
길쭉해서 터그놀이 하기도 좋구 삑삑 소리랑 바스락 소리나서 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ 장난감 살 때 색도 중요하게 보는 편인데 색감도 너무 예쁘구요 .. 귀여워요 정말정말
저희 강쥐가 장난감 자주 질려하는데 이건 오래 잘 가지고 놀아요 같이 잠도 잔답니당 >_<
선물용으로도 너무 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: Our pup's favorite toy these days ♥ It's long so it's great for tug play and she loves the squeaky and crinkling sounds ㅎㅎ I pay attention to color when buying toys and this one has such pretty colors too.. it's so cute really really. Our pup usually gets bored of toys quickly but she plays with this one for a long time and even sleeps with it >_< It would be perfect as a gift too!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 터그놀이 광공에게 넘 좋은 장난감이에요 길어서 잡고 당기기도 편하고 튼튼해서 오래오래 가지고노는중!!! 작아서 물기 좋은것도 넘 좋어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's such a great toy for my tug play fanatic! It's long so it's easy to grab and pull, and it's durable so we've been playing with it for a long time!!! It's also great that it's small and easy to bite ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지가 긴 장난감 흔드는 걸 좋아해서 하나 사줬는데 너무 좋아해요!! 애벌레 표정도 넘 귀엽고 삑삑이랑 바스락이 둘 다 있으니까 더 재밌어하는 것 같아요ㅎㅎ 삑삑이가 생각보다 소리가 잘 안나서 아쉽긴하지만 강쥐가 넘 좋아해서 저도 좋습니당(≧◡≦) ♡
reviews.content_en: My dog loves playing with long toys so I got her one and she loves it!! The caterpillar's expression is so cute and since there's both a squeaker and crinkle, she seems to enjoy it even more ㅎㅎ The squeaker doesn't make as much sound as I expected which is a bit disappointing, but my pup loves it so much that I love it too (≧◡≦) ♡

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
여러가지 장난감 사서 새로운거 하나씩 꺼내주고있어요 ㅋㅋ
역시나 너무 잘 가지고놀아요 🥹 
젤좋은건 인형에서 냄새도 안나고 촉감이 부들부들해서 제가 갖고놀고싶을정도 ㅎㅎ 
좋은 장난감 많이 만들어주세요❣️
reviews.content_en: I'm buying various toys and taking out new ones one by one ㅋㅋ She plays with it so well as expected 🥹 The best part is that the plush doesn't smell at all and the texture is so soft I want to play with it myself ㅎㅎ Please keep making good toys ❣️

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content: 삑삑이랑 바스락 콤보라니요ㅠㅠ 우리 애기 최애거든요!! 크기도 큼제막해서 터그처럼 놓아줘도 좋고, 진짜 좋아해요❤️
reviews.content_en: A squeaker and crinkle combo?? It's our baby's absolute favorite!! The size is generously big so it's nice to use it for tug play too, and she really loves it ❤️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
애벌레 생각보다 크네요.
울 댕댕이 길이만 해요.  찐 초록부분들이랑 머리부분 삑삑이가 있어서 눌렀을때 소리나서 좋아해요.
터그놀이로 잘 가지고 놀고 있습니다.
애벌레 짝꿍 양배추도 사줘야 겠어요.
reviews.content_en: The caterpillar is bigger than I thought. It's as long as my pup! The real green parts and the head have a squeaker so it makes a sound when I press it which is nice. We're playing tug with it well. I should get her the cabbage buddy for the caterpillar too.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 생각보다 작았는데 바스락삑삑거리고 길쭉해서 아주아주 귀여워요 강아지가 엄청 좋아해요!
reviews.content_en: It's smaller than I expected, but it crinkles and squeaks with such a cute elongated shape! My dog absolutely loves it!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
출시되자마자 이건 사야한다며 바로 결제했어요ㅋㅋㅋ
아니진짴ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ애벌레 진짜로 넘 귀여워욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋ🐛💚💛💚💛 택배 뜯자마자 빵 터졌네욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋ🤣 우래기두 진짜 마음에 들었는지 궁딩이 씰룩씰룩 꼬리 세차게 흔들깈ㅋㅋ❤️ 날라가는줄요🤣🤣❤️
바스락소리랑 삑삑이소리가 번갈아가면서 있어서 지루할 틈이 없어보여요😝
애벌레 오자마자 이거랑 터그놀이+애벌레물고 뛰어다니기💨 엄청나게 하고 완전 만족중인 사랑둥이입니댜🤭❤️
아 그리고 바잇미 양배추위에 애벌레 올려놓으니까 한층 더 귀여워요🤣🤣🤣
바잇미는▪︎▪︎▪︎매번 텅장만들기 프로젝트하시나봐효💛💸💸💸
아무도 안 산 사람은 있어도 한번만 산 사람은 절대 없는 바잇미▪︎▪︎▪︎💛 사랑합니다 진쨬ㅋㅋ😍
reviews.content_en: I bought it right away the moment it dropped lol It's seriously so cute, this caterpillar!! 🐛💚💛💚💛 I burst out laughing the second I opened the package 🤣 My pup really loved it too—his butt was wiggling and his tail was wagging like crazy 😂❤️ He was zooming around!! 🤣🤣❤️ The crinkle and squeaky sounds alternate so there's never a dull moment 😝 Ever since the caterpillar arrived, he's been doing tug games + running around with the caterpillar in his mouth 💨 I'm so incredibly satisfied with this little love of mine 🤭❤️ Oh and when I put the caterpillar on top of the BITE ME cabbage, it's even cuter!! 🤣🤣🤣 BITE ME really does empty my wallet every time huh 💛💸💸💸 There's nobody who bought BITE ME products and didn't buy them again 💛 I love you guys, seriously lol 😍

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 길다랗고 바스락+삑삑 소리 나서 아주 잘 갖고 놓아요 함께 터그놀이하는 재미가 있습니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's long and makes crinkle + squeaky sounds so my pup holds onto it really well. We have so much fun playing tug with it! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
장난감 완전많은데 요애벌래 장난감 제가봐두 완전 좋아요 길다래서 터그놀이하기도 좋구
울아가는 라텍스나 실리콘재질장난감보단 털달린인형재질 장난감을 좋아해서 너무 잘산거 같아용
찢어지면 또 구매하려구요!!
reviews.content_en: We have tons of toys, but even I think this caterpillar toy is absolutely great! It's long so it's perfect for tug games, and my pup prefers plush toys over latex or silicone ones, so I feel like I made an awesome purchase! If it tears, I'm definitely buying it again!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
터그놀이로 짱
생각보단 작지만 그래서 더 좋아하는 것 같아요ㅎㅎ
삑삑이 들어있어서 최고로 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: Perfect for tug games~ Smaller than expected but that's why he seems to like it even more ㅎㅎ There's a squeaker inside so it's the best!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
진짜 바잇미 장난감 최소 30개째 사용 중..
사주면서도 기분좋은 디자인에 강쥐 만족도도 끝내줘여
제품이 견고하지않은건 아닌데 조금 오래.. 더디게 망가뜨려주라....... 아가야.....
(저의 집 강쥐 최소 악어.. 모든걸 파괴함)
reviews.content_en: I'm on at least my 30th BITE ME toy... Buying them puts me in a good mood with the cute design and my pup's super satisfied too The product isn't fragile or anything, but... please break a little slower... please... 😭 (My pup is basically an alligator... destroys everything)

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 너무 맘에듭니다 배송도 빠르고 상품도 너무 좋고 가격도 저렴하게 잘 구매했습니다 감사합니다 번창하세여^_^*
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love it! The shipping was fast, the product is great, and I got a great deal. Thank you so much, wishing you much success! ^_^*

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너어무 좋아해요 한참을 신나게 가지고 놀았어요! 뽀시락뽀시락 소리랑 삑삑소리도 나서 요란하게 잘 놀아용
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much! He played with it excitedly for quite a while! The crinkly crinkly sounds and squeaky sounds are so noisy and he has a blast with it!

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ근데 올때부터 다리 하나가 떼어져 온 건지 첫날부터 다리 하나가 깔끔하게 옶더라구요..
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much lol But one of the legs came off or was already detached when it arrived—it was cleanly separated from the first day...

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
역시 터그 장난감으로 나와서 튼튼하네요 ^-^
인형으로 터그놀이 하는 걸 좋아하는데 놀다 보면 늘 박음질 선 터지더라구요
그렇게 다이소 인형들을 1회성 터그로 많이 사용했는데 ㅋ;;
애벌레 터그 장난감은 일단 너무 튼튼해서 만족스럽고
바스락이랑 삑삑이가 애벌레 몸에 골고루 배치돼 있어
아이가 재밌어 해요
reviews.content_en: True to its name as a tug toy, it's really durable! ^-^ My pup likes playing tug with plush toys, but the stitching usually comes undone after a few plays. I've bought a lot of dollar store plushes as one-time tug toys because of that lol;; But this caterpillar tug toy is so sturdy I'm really satisfied, and the crinkle and squeaky sounds are evenly distributed throughout the caterpillar's body so my pup has a blast with it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
보리가 너무 좋아해요 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요 
길어서 터그놀이하기도 좋고 중간에 삑삑 바스락이 섞여있다보니 더 좋아해요 
애벌레 인형 물고 돌아다니는데 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Bori absolutely loves it and plays with it so much! It's long so it's great for tug-of-war, and it has squeakers and crinkle sounds mixed in which makes it even better. It's so cute watching her carry around the caterpillar toy and run around with it 😄

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
적당한 뽀시락함에 삑삑이가 두개 들어있어서 얘들이 더 집중해서 가지고 놀아요!!
애벌레 하나로 서로 대치한 둘의 뒤통수가 넘모 기엽내용ㅋㅎㅋㅎ
reviews.content_en: It has just the right amount of crinkle and two squeakers inside, so my pups really focus on playing with it!! The two of them facing off with one caterpillar toy, their backs to each other, is so adorable ㅋㅎㅋㅎ

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
이정도면 너무 좋아하는거 같죠?! 귀여유ㅓ @@@
내귀염둥이 
삑삑소리랑 바스락소리 너무 좋아요
reviews.content_en:
At this point it's clear how much they love it?! So cute ㅓ @@@
My sweet baby loves the squeaker sounds and crinkle sounds so much!

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 장난감 꺼내자마자 너무 좋아했어요!! 애착인형 되어버렸는데 우리 강쥐는 힘이 좋아서 벌써 더듬이랑 발 한 쪽이 날라가버렸네요,,,, 진짜 맨날 물고 빨고 세상에 둘도없는 단짝친구가 생긴거 같아서 뿌듯합니다요!!
reviews.content_en: She loved it as soon as I took the toy out!! It became her comfort toy, but my strong pup has so much bite force that she already ripped off one antenna and one paw... She bites and chews it constantly, and it feels so rewarding having seen her find her one and only best friend in the world!!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 엄청 잘 가지고 놀아요 장난담 귀신이라 다 잘 가지고 놀긴 하지만 😅 새 장난감만 보면 눈 돌아서 달려들어용 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: She plays with it so well! She's a toy fanatic so she plays with everything well 😅 but whenever she sees a new toy she goes crazy and rushes right at it ㅋ

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
저희 아이가 진짜 엄~~~청 좋아해요
그전에도 구매했었는데 다 물어뜯겨서 재구매한거거든요
근데 하도 미친듯이 물고 뜯고 하니까
1주일만에 여기저기 구멍나고 솜 튀어나오고 난리났어요
아이가 너무 좋아해서 또 구매하려구요
reviews.content_en:
My pup absolutely LOVES it!
I bought it before and she destroyed it, so I'm buying it again.
But because she bites and tears at it so aggressively, it got holes all over and stuffing poking out within just a week!
Since my pup loves it so much, I'm going to buy it again.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 바스락에 환장하고 삑삑이에 환장하는데 그 두 개가 함께 있어서.. 엄청엄청 좋아해요 터그놀이 할 수도 있고 인형 물고 흔드는 거 좋아하는데 그것도 할 수 있습니당 택배 뜯자마자 자기 자리로 가서 실컷 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: She's obsessed with the crinkle sounds and obsessed with the squeakers, and since it has both... she loves it SO much! She can do tug-of-war and she loves shaking the toy around, and she can do that too! As soon as the package arrived, she ran to her spot and played with it to her heart's content.

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 맨날 터트리지만 또 사줄 수 밖에 없는 이유…  너무 좋아해서 진짜 잘 가지고 놀아요!!!
reviews.content_en: She destroys it every time but I have no choice but to buy it again... She loves it so much and plays with it really well!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
왕귀여워요
길쭉하고 굴곡이 있어서 터그놀이 하기도 좋고
바스락 소리도 나고
색감도 귀엽고 벌레 표정도 씹덕입니다
reviews.content_en:
So adorable!
It's long and curved so it's great for tug-of-war,
it makes crinkle sounds,
the colors are cute,
and the bug's expression is just chef's kiss.

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
우선 저희 아이는 얼레벌레 쳐돌이입니다
벌써 재구매 4? 5번째인 것 같아요
"벌레 갖고와" 하면 바로 알아듣고 갖고올 정도로 사랑하구요
모든 장난감 다 제쳐두고 이걸 맨날 물어와요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
과격한 터그놀이를 좋아해서 벌레가 금방 죽지만...
계속 리필을 해주고 있어요 ㅎㅎ.. (텅장 ㅠ)
세일을 한다면 두세개 사서 쟁여놔야겠어요
reviews.content_en:
First of all, my pup is an absolute caterpillar maniac.
I think this is my 4th or 5th repurchase already.
When I say "bring the bug" she understands right away and brings it—that's how much she loves it!
She ignores all her other toys and carries this one around in her mouth all day ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
She loves rough tug-of-war so the bug doesn't last long...
but I keep buying refills ㅎㅎ.. (my wallet is crying ㅠ)
If they have a sale, I need to stock up on a few!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 준지 하루만에 박살날정도로 가지고 놀았어요 한쪽은 삑삑이고 다른쪽은 바스락 거리는 재질이라 더 미쳐 놀더라고요 왕추천입니다
reviews.content_en: Junji destroyed it in just one day playing with it! One side has a squeaker and the other side has a crinkly material, so he went absolutely crazy for it 😄 Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
남자친구가 키우는 강아지에게 관심받고 싶어서… 애벌레인형을 선물로 사갔더니 강아지가 너무 좋아해요!! 완전 뿌듯해요ㅎㅎㅎ가방에서 딱 꺼내자마자 자기꺼인줄 어떻게 알구 더듬이 물어뜯구 난리도 아니였어요🐛
너무 좋아해서 코코님께 한달에 한개씩 인형 갖다 바치려구요. 코코 사랑행ㄹㄹ❤️❤️
reviews.content_en: I wanted to get my boyfriend's dog's attention, so I bought him a caterpillar plush as a gift and the dog loves it so much!! I'm so proud 🥰 The second I pulled it out of the bag, he knew it was his and started chewing on the antennae like crazy 🐛 He loves it so much that I'm planning to bring Koko a new plush toy every month. Love you Koko ❤️❤️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 새장난감 좋아합니다. ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Love the bird toy haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
오랫만에 사준 새 장난감
너무 좋아합니다 .
reviews.content_en:
A new toy I got after a long time
He loves it so much.

reviews.name: 껌****
reviews.content: 이거 보자마자 넘 좋아하고 혼자도 잘 가지고 놀더라구요
reviews.content_en: As soon as he saw this, he loved it so much and plays with it well on his own too

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
새 장난감을 매우 좋아해서 찾던중 구입했어요~
어제 새걸 뜯어줘서 다음주에 줄려고 숨겨놨는데 찾아서 놀고있네요😂 한동안은 애벌레 장난감으로 잘 놀것 같아요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves new toys so much, so I bought this~ I opened it for him yesterday and hid it to give next week, but he found it and is playing with it now 😂 I think he'll have fun with the caterpillar toy for a while

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content: 기다란 애벌레의 몸통에서 삑삑이 들어있는 부분 찾는것도 재밌어하고 조그맣게 달려있는 다리부분도 저희 강아지 기준(?) 물어뜯을 수 있는 부분이에요😄 동물인형의 귀, 꼬리, 코 부분은 남아나질 않거든요ㅎ 애벌레 다리도 하나씩 사라지지 않을까 생각되지만 다리가 8개나 있다는 점ㅎ 그리고 무엇보다 강아지가 즐겁다면 말 다한거죠ㅎ 마지막으로는 더듬이 포인트도 찾았나봐요🙃 지금은 더듬이 가지고 재밌게 놀아요! 더듬이부터 발끝까지 다 저희 강아지가 좋아하는 포인트가 가득한 애벌레 장난감이었습니다~ 생일선물로 사주길 잘했어요🥰
reviews.content_en: He has fun finding the squeaker hidden in the caterpillar's long body, and the small legs attached are something our dog can chew on 😄 With other animal plushes, the ears, tail, and nose don't last long, you know ㅎ I'm sure the caterpillar's legs will disappear one by one, but the fact that there are 8 of them ㅎ And most importantly, if our dog is happy, that's all that matters ㅎ I think he also found the antennae as another favorite spot now 🙃 He's having fun playing with the antennae! From the antennae to the tips of his toes, this caterpillar toy is packed with all the spots our dog loves~ I'm so glad I bought it as a birthday gift 🥰

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아합니다!! 원래 있던 애착인형을 제쳐두고 이것만 갖고 놀아요!ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 바스락 소리랑 삑삑 소리도 나서 더 좋아하네용 이걸로 터그 놀이하다가 유치도 빠졌어요😊
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much!! He put aside his old favorite plush and only plays with this one! ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ He likes it even more because of the crinkly and squeaky sounds, and he even lost a tooth playing tug-of-war with it 😊

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 애기 주자마자 바로 최애인형 등극했어요! 애기가 다리가 긴데도 뒤뚱거리면사 물고 댕기는거 넘 귀엽구... 작은 입이라 손이나 더듬이 물고 댕기는데 짱 귀여워요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: As soon as I gave it to the pup, it became his favorite toy instantly! My baby has long legs but the way he waddles around and carries it in his mouth is so cute... His mouth is small so he carries it by the legs or antennae and it's just adorable ㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 전체가 바스락이네요 삑삑이 소리가 잘 안나요
reviews.content_en: It's cute, but the whole thing is crinkly. The squeaker doesn't make much sound though.
